---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the dashboard
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Riko5652
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that's currently difficult or impossible?

> Example: "I have to manually check three different places to compare my token usage between Claude Code and Cursor..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Which AI Tool(s) Does This Affect?
- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Gemini / Antigravity
- [ ] All tools / general dashboard
- [ ] New tool support (specify): ___

## Dashboard Section
Which tab or section of the dashboard would this affect?
- [ ] Overview
- [ ] Achievements / XP
- [ ] Tool Comparison
- [ ] Sessions
- [ ] Token Analysis
- [ ] AI Authorship
- [ ] Optimization
- [ ] New section

## Privacy Consideration
Does this feature require any external network calls or sending data outside localhost?
- [ ] No — fully local
- [ ] Yes — explain why: ___

## Additional Context
Add mockups, examples, or any other context here.
